text.title: Persona Building Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: Email-marketing tool personas
example.note: Cluster 47 transcripts on JTBD tags; 3 segments emerge: solo creators, indie hackers, enterprise marketers. Primary = Solo creator Sofia (JTBD: 'manage subs in <5min during writing flow'); pains ranked: onboarding (#1), pricing confusion, AI subject-line help. Quotes: i-001 'I gave up after step 3', i-002 'do not understand tiers', i-007 'subject lines take 20 min', i-014 'switched from ConvertKit', i-022 'five-minute target or I quit'. Secondary = Indie hacker Ivan (JTBD: 'wire newsletter into my product stack via API'). Negative = Enterprise marketer (>100-person team, SSO + procurement; product unfit). Audit: 5+ cross-interview quotes per persona => pass.
